title: lichen-link: frame.rs AddrMode::from_u8 unwrap for consistency
description: rust/lichen-link/src/frame.rs:233 uses unwrap() on AddrMode::from_u8. While technically safe (value is masked to 0-3), it should use ok_or() pattern for consistency with MicLength::from_u8 on line 235-236.
close_reason: Wontfix: the value is masked to 0-3 which covers all AddrMode variants. The unwrap is safe by construction and the comment documents this. Changing to ok_or would add noise for no safety benefit.
